name: Git Glide GUI
iteration_focus: v3.6.10.1 workflow guard and merge guide hotfix
added: Branch switching now warns on dirty work but offers a switch anyway choice
Switch anyway lets Git attempt the branch switch and rely on Git to block unsafe overwrites
Pull, merge, and other higher-risk workflows keep stricter clean-working-tree protection
next_recommended: Add a branch-switch preflight that predicts whether dirty files overlap with the target branch
Add optional auto-stash before branch switch with clear recovery guidance
Add branch cleanup guidance after merged feature branches
highlights: Restores clearer merge support that had become hidden or too current-branch dependent
Supports the real workflow: push feature upstream, merge selected feature into develop, run checks, merge develop into main
Keeps every merge/push action previewable and confirmation-based
